title: aerangis biloba
intro: Aerangis biloba, also known as the Bilobed Aerangis, is a species of epiphytic orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. It is prized for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health. The leaves and roots of the Aerangis biloba plant have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, and are valued for their antioxidant and antimicrobial properties. Aerangis biloba can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are believed to offer a range of health benefits, including improved immune function and reduced oxidative stress.
